hero.subtitle: Tell us what you have in mind and we take care of everything. You relax, the code is on us.

services.title: Solutions that drive your business
services.subtitle: We transform ideas into high-impact digital products with cutting-edge technology.

web.title: Custom Web Development
web.description: We design and build websites and applications 100% tailored to your business. Cutting-edge tech, flawless performance and user experience that turns visitors into customers.

seo.title: SEO & Web Positioning
seo.description: We make your business show up on Google when your customers search for you. Technical optimization, strategic content and continuous tracking so you dominate organic results in your industry.

payments.title: Payment Integration
payments.description: Accept online payments with any method. We integrate Mercado Pago, Stripe, PayPal, credit/debit cards, bank transfers and more. Your business ready to sell 24/7.

cloud.title: Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.description: Your project always online, fast and secure. We set up the infrastructure to grow with your business without you worrying about anything technical.

ai.title: Applied Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: We automate processes and boost your business with intelligent solutions. From chatbots to predictive analytics, we make AI work for you.

dashboard.title: Admin Panel & Metrics
dashboard.description: Total control of your business. We build custom admin panels with real-time metrics, automated reports and visual dashboards so you can make data-driven decisions.

process.title: From your idea to reality in record time
process.subtitle: Agile methodology with weekly deliveries. You just share your idea, we do the rest.

step1.title: Tell us your idea
step1.description: Just tell us what you have in mind. Via chat, audio or video call. We listen and understand.

step2.title: We plan everything
step2.description: We build the strategy, design and technical architecture. You approve and we get started.

step3.title: MVP in 1 week
step3.description: In 7 days you have a working version to see, touch and request changes. No hassle.

step4.title: We iterate together
step4.description: Every week you see real progress. Request changes, we apply them instantly. Your project evolves with you.

projects.title: Projects that speak for themselves
projects.subtitle: Every project is a success story. See what we build for our clients.

testimonials.title: Clients who trust Pentacode
testimonials.subtitle: The best advertising is a satisfied client. Hear what those who have worked with us have to say.

quote.title: Have an idea? Tell us
quote.subtitle: Choose how you prefer to communicate. Fill out the form, record an audio with your idea or chat with our AI.

form.title: Quick form
form.name: Your name
form.audio: Or record an audio telling us your idea
form.success: Request sent! We'll contact you soon.

footer.description: We transform ideas into high-impact digital products. Your project, our passion.
